title: Housing Benefit subsidy guidance manual 2024 to 2025
body: "This guidance covers subsidies for:   benefit costs administration costs   Best practice guide  We’ve also published the Housing Benefit subsidy claims: local authority best practice guide to help local authorities minimise or avoid qualified audits of HB subsidy claims.  Guidance for 2015 to 2024 and earlier  Housing Benefit subsidy guidance manual 2023 to 2024  Housing Benefit subsidy guidance manual 2022 to 2023  Housing Benefit subsidy guidance manual 2021 to 2022  Housing Benefit subsidy guidance manual 2020 to 2021  HB subsidy guidance for 2018 to 2019  HB subsidy guidance for 2017 to 2018  HB subsidy guidance for 2016 to 2017  HB subsidy guidance for 2015 to 2016  HB subsidy guidance for 2014 to 2015  HB and Council Tax Benefit (CTB) subsidy guidance for 2013 to 2014  Archives  We’ve archived the HB and CTB Subsidy Guidance Manual 2012 to 2013.  Guidance for earlier years can be found on the National Archives website.  "
